label: Ashlock Stores
description: Ashlock Stores is a narrow storage chamber cut into the slagcrete shell adjoining Riftshade Hearthroom, sealed behind an ash-gasketed hatch to preserve the bastion’s interior air. Shelving of riveted steel and scavenged wreck-plate rises to the ceiling, its bays tagged with stenciled numerals and devotional warnings against waste. The floor is lined with stackable ration tins, filter canisters, and bundled thermal cloth, while shielded conduit runs overhead to keep the space within the hab-tier’s redundant life-support envelope. Bruise-colored auroral spill reaches only as a thin seam beneath the door, leaving the chamber lit by cold lumen strips set into soot-dark panels.
